blocks.text: Excellent — now I have clear AFCON standings through matchday 2-3. Key insight for the bracket: **DR Congo (2nd in Group D) is bracketed to face Group E winner Algeria in the Round of 16** (R16-7: 1E v 2D). Algeria has been dominant (3-0 Sudan, 1-0 Burkina Faso). This sharply updates my "who knocks DR Congo out" forecast.
